title: Assorted Colors Dolphin Bottle with Straw - 500 ml, Leakproof & Lightweight Plastic Water Bottle - Perfect for School & Outdoor Adventures (1 Pc.)
features: FUN & UNIQUE DESIGN: Make hydration enjoyable for kids with our assorted colors dolphin bottle with straw - 500 ml (1 pc.)! Topped with a cute dolphin in two eye-catching colors—pink and blue (one color received per order).

EASY & CONVENIENT DRINKING: Featuring a flexible straw that allows for effortless sipping, making it suitable for children of all ages, and encourages them to drink more water throughout their busy days.

REUSABLE & ECO-FRIENDLY: Save money and reduce plastic waste by ditching disposable bottles. Our durable and reusable water bottle helps protect the environment while providing an adorable choice for their daily adventures.

PERFECT FOR SCHOOL & OUTDOOR ADVENTURES: Your child's ideal companion for school, picnics, hiking, and sports events. This 500ml lightweight and leakproof water bottle ensures they stay refreshed, with no spills and messes.
HIGH-QUALITY, LEAKPROOF MATERIAL: Crafted from lightweight and sturdy plastic that ensures durability while preventing leaks and maintaining the bottle's fun and vibrant aesthetics.
description: Add a splash of color to your hydration routine with the assorted colors dolphin bottle with straw. With a capacity of 500 ml, this lightweight and compact water bottle is perfect for school, outdoor adventures, and everything in between. Made from durable and lightweight plastic, this bottle is designed to withstand the rigors of daily use. The leak-proof design ensures that you can toss it in your bag without worrying about any spills. But what sets this bottle apart is its vibrant, dolphin-themed design available in an assortment of colors. Each bottle also comes with a handy straw, making it easier for kids to stay hydrated. The assorted colors dolphin bottle with straw is more than just a water bottle - it's a fun and practical accessory that makes drinking water a delightful experience.
